channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Apple faces a $162 million fine from French regulators. Here’s why
item.description: Apple was hit with a 150 million euro ($162.4 million) fine by French antitrust regulators on Monday for abusing its dominant position in mobile app advertising on its devices via a privacy control tool.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Nearly half of businesses worldwide are embarrassed by their website
item.description: Despite spending big on marketing tech, many ecommerce businesses still find their websites embarrassing and ineffective.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Dow wants to power its Texas manufacturing complex with new nuclear reactors instead of natural gas
item.description: Dow, a major producer of chemicals and plastics, wants to use next-generation nuclear reactors for clean power and steam at a Texas manufacturing complex instead of natural gas.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Mcdermott, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 23andMe’s rise and fall, in four charts
item.description: Just months after it started trading on the Nasdaq in June 2021, the company was valued as high as $5.8 billion. As of Friday, the firm’s shares were worth less than a dollar.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Surfshark unveils new end-to-end encryption patent to reduce metadata collection
item.description: Surfshark unveils new plans to handle encryption and reduce visible metadata. Here's why it's important for your privacy.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: Mortgage company Rocket buying Mr. Cooper in $9.4 billion stock deal
item.description: Mortgage company Rocket is buying rival Mr. Cooper in an all-stock deal valued at $9.4 billion, just weeks after buying real estate listing company Redfin.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Apple and SpaceX enter the Star Wars era
item.description: Apple and SpaceX may be on a satellite communications collision course with Elon Musk’s firm attempting to block Apple from expanding satellite messaging for iPhones unless it does so with Starlink rather than other satellite communications partners.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump expects TikTok 'deal' ahead of deadline
item.description: President Trump indicated Sunday that he expects to reach a deal on TikTok ahead of an April 5 deadline for his administration to begin enforcing a ban on the popular video-sharing app.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Garmin's new subscription is causing chaos: Here are the six features behind the new paywall
item.description: Garmin's subscription is causing a lot of upset among users, but what do you even get for your money?
item.dc:creator: stephen.warwick@futurenet.com (Stephen Warwick), TechRadar

item.title: Stroke survivor speaks again with the help of an experimental brain-computer implant
item.description: Scientists have developed a device that can translate thoughts about speech into spoken words in real time.
item.dc:creator: Laura Ungar, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jack Black, Jason Momoa enter the Minecraft universe as the video game phenom hits the big screen
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — When Jack Black got the call to star in the “Minecraft” movie, the perks were plenty. He got to work alongside Jason Momoa, reunite with “Nacho Libre” director Jared Hess and engulf himself into a beloved gaming universe.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New phishing attack uses real-time interception to bypass 2FA
item.description: This phishing kit bypasses 2FA via session hijacking and real-time credential theft. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson offers four ways to stay safe from Astaroth phishing attacks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Scientists shielding farming from climate change need more public funding. But they're getting less
item.description: Public funding for agricultural research in the U.S. has been declining for the last two decades, a process Trump has rapidly accelerated by freezing or pausing support for a variety of research programs financed by the USDA, EPA and other organizations.
item.dc:creator: Melina Walling, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Nvidia's new Game Ready Drivers appear to be so bad that game developers are warning gamers to stay away
item.description: Nvidia's recent Game Ready Drivers aren't just affecting system functionality, but they've also left game developers advising older versions.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Weekend news dump: GSA, SBA, IRS initiate new workforce cuts
item.description: A roundup of news from late Friday afternoon that you may have missed about SBA, GSA reopening the Deferred Resignation Program. The post Weekend news dump: GSA, SBA, IRS initiate new workforce cuts first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: iOS 18.4 gets official release notes: Apple Intelligence, new Photos tools, Ambient Music, and more
item.description: The official release notes for iOS 18.4 are here, and it seems the iPhone is getting a decent handful of new features in the latest midyear software update – expect Apple Intelligence upgrades, new Photos features, and a smattering of bug fixes.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: Forget Samsung's new modular OLED panels – if this tech works on TVs we could get giant OLED TVs at half the price
item.description: Does this modular tech quietly fix the biggest problem in making huge OLED TVs? Only if it can overcome its own biggest flaw…
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Fire at Tesla dealership near Rome destroys 17 cars
item.description: Rome’s fire service said it was investigating “all avenues” while looking into how the fire started, but it did not rule out arson.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com, The Mercury News

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Army Lt. Gen. Jeth Rey on achieving data centricity
item.description: By integrating zero trust into a less complex network infrastructure, the military can access data to speed decisions, Army G-6 deputy chief of staff says. The post DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Army Lt. Gen. Jeth Rey on achieving data centricity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: China's telecoms giant Huawei Technologies says its profit fell 28% while revenue surged in 2024
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Chinese telecoms gear giant Huawei said Monday its net profit fell 28% in 2024 while its revenue surged, as the company invested heavily in advanced technologies.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Businesses are struggling to scale AI across their business
item.description: Leaders and managers are more likely to use AI than workers because companies are only bothered about financial ROI.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: How AI is transforming IDEs into intelligent development assistants
item.description: Ever feel like you’re spending more time squashing bugs than actually building something? You’re not alone—developers spend a whopping 35% of their time debugging and reviewing code instead of writing it. That’s like ordering pizza and only eating the crust.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump calls 'never ending' Signal leak story 'old and boring,' blasts media
item.description: President Trump slammed the media for its “never-ending” coverage of the Signal group chat leak, calling it “old and boring.” In a post Sunday on Truth Social, Trump praised Sen. Markwayne Mullin (R-Okla.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: North Korea's suicide drone test
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Elon Musk says he sold X to his AI company
item.description: Elon Musk on Friday evening announced he has sold his social media company, X, to xAI, his artificial intelligence company, in a deal that values X at $33 billion.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Why the ‘iPhone of smartwatches’ remains so elusive
item.description: Ever since it became obvious that the iPhone was one of the most transformative consumer products in history, a question has been floating out there: Would its impact ever be matched by a device in an even newer category? And if something pulled it off, what would it be? After a decade and a half—so
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: This may be the most private and secure cloud-based AI solution around
item.description: What if you could build a business-specific generative AI (genAI) solution that was hosted in the cloud? What if that cloud used the most energy-efficient systems in the world? And what if those services were also all running on the world’s most secure computing platform, the Mac? Wonder no more, b
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Salesforce’s Jamison Braun on adopting a maturity model for ‘natural’ digital transformation
item.description: This five-layer maturity model for digital transformation will break down silos and speed up decision-making at DoD, says Salesforce VP of global public sector.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Hypori’s Jared Shepard on implementing zero trust security on mobile devices
item.description: The Hypori CEO details cloud approach and tactics for using mobile devices for secure collaboration. The post DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Hypori’s Jared Shepard on implementing zero trust security on mobile devices first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Airtel connects India with 100Tbps submarine cable
item.description: In a significant development for digital infrastructure in India, Bharti Airtel has landed the 2Africa Pearls submarine cable, delivering 100 Terabits per second of international network capacity for the country. The submarine cable will connect to Airtel’s cable landing station (CLS) in Mumbai.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Hundreds of New AI Tools Emerge: 5 to Explore
item.description: AI tools are emerging at a rapid pace, offering innovative solutions for various tasks and industries. We've selected five new AI tools worth exploring, each with unique features and capabilities.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: Signal chat discussion of 'clearly classified' information violated law, experts say
item.description: The inadvertent inclusion of a journalist on a Signal group chat discussing attack plans means officials likely violated the Espionage Act and public records laws while flouting guidance on how to discuss sensitive information.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, The Hill

item.title: 6 advanced Gboard tricks for smarter Android typing
item.description: QWERTY, QWERTY, QWERTY. QWERTY. Oh — hi there! Sorry for the slightly nonsensical greeting. I’ve been thinking a lot about keyboards this week, y’see, and how that trusty ol’ QWERTY surface has evolved in our lives. Also, saying “QWERTY” over and over again is surprisingly fun to do.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Nvidia-backed CoreWeave slashes IPO size and price amid investor concerns
item.description: CoreWeave plans to reduce the size of its U.S. initial public offering and price its shares below the indicated range, a person familiar with the matter told Reuters on Thursday, dampening expectations that the listing would boost investor appetite for IPOs.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: The Trump Administration's Use of Signal Raises Questions About Security and Classified Information
item.description: The use of popular messaging app Signal by the Trump administration to discuss sensitive military plans raises questions about security and the importance of safeguarding classified information.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Los Angeles sheriff's department to retest 4,000 DNA samples after using faulty kits for 8 months
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department said this week it will retest 4,000 DNA samples and open an internal investigation after learning that it used potentially flawed test kits for eight months.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Figure skating embraces the future with new technology, modern concepts to engage athletes and fans
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Ashley Wagner and Ben Agosto know what it's like to step off the ice at the figure skating world championships and feel as though they've conquered the sport. And what it feels like when the notoriously fickle sport bites back.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Judge allows newspaper copyright lawsuit against OpenAI to proceed
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal judge has ruled that The New York Times and other newspapers can proceed with a copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft seeking to end the practice of using their stories to train artificial intelligence chatbots. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5
